text: Conspiracy theories about Sen. McConnell’s health spread after his office posts hospital photo - NBC News
fullText: Even two of McConnell’s GOP colleagues questioned the photograph without evidence in a sign of political distrust after his office spent weeks declining to explain his hospitalization.

text: Musicians, DJ among 10 dead after plane crashes in the Bahamas - USA Today
fullText: Ten people died after a Cessna 402 crashed in the Bahamas. The Bahamas Musicians and Entertainers Union said Bahamian musicians and a DJ are among the dead.
